footer.aboutDescription: Full-Stack Engineer focused on building thoughtful digital products. Code. Create. Connect.

profile.bio: 10 years of software development experience, specializing in insurance and financial systems. Led core modules including expense management, payment processing, and accounting engines. Experienced in distributed architecture design and AI implementation. PMP certified, dedicated to transforming complex business rules into robust technical solutions.
